name: pixellab-codex
description: Connect Codex to the official PixelLab MCP server for pixel-art generation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use PixelLab's official MCP from Codex
interface.longDescription: Add PixelLab's hosted MCP tools to Codex for characters, animations, tilesets, isometric tiles, and map objects directly from your game-development workflow.
